description: Synthetic natural-resources case: abandoned mine and degraded-slope restoration priority planning under budget, hydrological-risk, and habitat-connectivity objectives.
action: select one restoration unit at each planning step; selected units become restored and cannot be selected again
hard_constraints: unit must not have been restored previously
cumulative restoration cost must stay within budget
at least 25% of selected units should be within 2 km of water network for watershed-risk scenario, configurable as a soft or hard constraint
protected ecological-source polygons are not restoration candidates but contribute connectivity reward

reward_terms.habitat_connectivity: bonus when selected units touch existing ecological sources or already restored units, weighted by shared boundary length and biodiversity
reward_terms.water_quality: sum water_gain of selected units near streams
reward_terms.equity_exposure: sum human_exposure-weighted risk reduction near settlements
